home.title: Create & Share Tier Lists
home.description: Create beautiful image-based tier lists and share them with anyone
home.subtitle: Build a tier list in seconds, drag items where they belong, and send one clean link when it is ready.
home.feature1Desc: Move items across tiers naturally and reorder them without friction.
home.feature2Desc: Every board gets a link immediately, so you can send it as soon as it looks right.
home.feature3Desc: Use text or image items for games, food, anime, products, and anything else worth ranking.
home.sectionTitle: One editor. One link. One clean export.
